ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the nav landmark.

target.description: CSS selector used to find the target heading container in derived mode.

headingSelector.description: CSS selector used to gather headings inside the target element.

observeRootMargin.description: Root margin passed to IntersectionObserver for active-section detection.

unsupportedProps.name: items
unsupportedProps.description: Explicit nested TOC items for controlled mode.
